text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm pretty sure this is the meeting spot...
Why isn't anyone here yet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This is the place we're supposed to meet up for our pajama party snack run, right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Are you part of the snack run too,
Goddesses? If you are, then let's get goin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Knowing my squad, they'd probably have a blast
partying it up with you!
